title: nyctosma nocturna
intro: Nyctosma nocturna, also known as Night-blooming Nyctosma, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Nyctosma nocturna include relief from respiratory problems, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce menstrual cramps and alleviate digestive issues. Nyctosma nocturna is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in infusions and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
